body:
you are standing in the exuberant air on a road which leads to the north and south. In the north, you can see a little village; little in the meaning that whatever resides there must be equally little. In the east, you are approaching a mountain and in the west, a huge forest blocks the eye.

Right in front of you, a big board can be seen. All sorts of little papers are littered all over it. A sign is pinned to the board. You could try reading the sign.
title: The Road
